subject: Explore project context
description: Check files, docs, recent commits in /home/ruki/portfolio

subject: Offer visual companion
description: Offer browser-based visual companion for mockups and diagrams

subject: Ask clarifying questions
description: Ask one question at a time to understand purpose, constraints, success criteria

subject: Propose 2-3 approaches
description: Propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs and recommendation

subject: Present design
description: Present design in sections scaled to complexity, get user approval

subject: Write design doc
description: Save spec to docs/superpowers/specs/ and commit

subject: Spec self-review
description: Check for placeholders, contradictions, ambiguity, scope issues

subject: User reviews written spec
description: Ask user to review the written spec before proceeding

subject: Transition to implementation
description: Invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan
